# Kingsley Afolabi Aremu

> Kingsley Afolabi Aremu is a Lagos-based full-stack engineer and creative engineer building polished web products, mobile experiences, AI agent tooling, automation systems, and performance-focused interfaces.

## Featured Work

- FormMate AI: FormMate AI helps users move through repetitive web forms faster by pasting a form URL, talking through the required information, and reviewing AI-suggested responses before anything is used. The product is framed around user control, not bulk submission or spam. Tech/focus: typescript, ai, voice, automation. repo: https://github.com/iice257/FormMate | live: https://form-mate-ai.vercel.app
- PasteVault: PasteVault is a private, installable online clipboard for saving, searching, and sharing text, code, links, and JSON across devices without messaging yourself. It turns scattered snippets into a lightweight personal vault that works across devices. Tech/focus: javascript, pwa, productivity, clipboard. repo: https://github.com/iice257/PasteVault | live: https://pastevault-lime.vercel.app
- AI Agent Skills: AI Agent Skills is a practical tooling collection for extending AI agents with repeatable workflows. It sits alongside related repos for autoresearch, parser routing, idea launching, publishing, and skill updates, forming a small personal automation ecosystem. Tech/focus: python, codex, agents, automation. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Skills-quickstarter | live: https://skills-quickstarter.vercel.app
- Restore AI: Restore AI is a mobile product for image repair workflows: restoration, upscaling, resizing, and recoloring. It is framed as a practical utility for turning damaged or low-quality images into usable personal or professional assets. Tech/focus: mobile, ai image, restoration, ux. repo: https://github.com/iice257/RestoreAI

## Highlighted Portfolio System

- 2026 Portfolio: The current portfolio website and the codebase powering this page. Tech/focus: next.js, performance, interaction design, ci. repo: https://github.com/iice257/2026-Portfolio | live: https://kingsleyaremu.vercel.app

## Major Project Signals

- Bountic: Zero-friction, autonomous USDC bounties for the agentic open-source economy. Tech/focus: crypto, agents, open source. repo: https://github.com/iice257/bountic | live: https://bountic.vercel.app
- Loop Monitor: Local dashboard for live agent tracking, bounty leaderboards, and AI judge verdicts. Tech/focus: dashboard, agents, ops. repo: https://github.com/iice257/loop-monitor
- Rustchain: A DePIN concept where vintage hardware participates in a Proof-of-Antiquity blockchain. Tech/focus: blockchain, depin, hardware. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Rustchain | live: https://rustchain.org
- Pages Forward: A second iteration of the Pages Forward bookstore, rebuilt with a clearer product surface and stronger commerce direction. Tech/focus: javascript, commerce, frontend, content. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Pages-forward-rebuild
- SignalOps: An agentic security and operations triage cockpit. Tech/focus: typescript, security, ops. repo: https://github.com/iice257/signalops | live: https://signalops-orpin.vercel.app
- Unfollowr: A social media account management dashboard with health metrics, hygiene queues, experiments, and action logs. Tech/focus: typescript, dashboard, social. repo: https://github.com/iice257/Unfollowr
